text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is finally here. Hoping to make it
a perfect finale, Fine Motion swears to put on a
performance that will remain in the hearts of
everyone who watches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's close friend Daiwa Scarlet is
running today. And that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is running too. Fine Motion feels that
she would make for the perfect opponent in her
final race, given that Shakur was there when she
started running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, the starting signal is primed for their
final battle.
